docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PACHLA, DAVID FRANCIS AS TO DEFENDANT ARGENT SOFTWARE, INC., (WHICH WILL DO BUSINESS IN CALIFORNIA AS ARGENT SALES CORP.), A DELAWARE CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
